steps.title: Use the historical norm
steps.content: Today, simple stages can surprise audiences because elaborate sets are common. The passage then contrasts the distant past, when highly decorated and detailed sets were not common until the 1600s.

steps.title: Choose what was normal
steps.content: A and B suggest ancient audiences reacted negatively or with confusion, but the passage gives no such evidence. D suggests excitement, even though simple stages would not have been unusual. Since elaborate sets were uncommon, simple stages would have been normal to audiences then. The answer is C.
